title: K8s Config
description: Adds Kubernetes Deployment, Service, and Ingress manifests to the project

applicationName.description: Used in resource names, labels, and image reference

namespace.x-prompt: What Kubernetes namespace should be used?

port.description: Container port exposed by the Deployment and targeted by the Service
port.x-prompt: What container port should be exposed?

replicas.description: Desired replica count in the Deployment
replicas.x-prompt: How many replicas should be in the Deployment?

ingressHost.x-prompt: What hostname should be used for the Ingress rule?
